category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for export from China to Morocco under ANRT mandatory homologation and IMANOR standardisation.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (ANRT / IMANOR)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入摩洛哥：ANRT/IMANOR合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入摩洛哥：ANRT/IMANOR合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Morocco ANRT mandatory homologation (type approval) under Telecom Law 24-96 and its amendments, IMANOR NM (Norme Marocaine) technical and EMC standards (IEC/ETSI/EN-harmonized), electrical safety requirements for 220–240 V / 50 Hz supply with Type C/E plug, authorized Moroccan importer obligations, French-language documentation requirements, DGSSI cybersecurity advisory under Law 05-20, and 5 GHz indoor frequency restriction.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与摩洛哥ANRT依据电信法24-96及其修正案的强制型式核准、IMANOR NM（摩洛哥标准）技术及电磁兼容标准（与IEC/ETSI/EN协调）、220–240V/50Hz供电及C/E型插头电气安全要求、摩洛哥授权进口商义务、法语文件要求、法律05-20下DGSSI网络安全指引，以及5GHz室内频段限制的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與摩洛哥ANRT依據電信法24-96及其修正案的強制型式核准、IMANOR NM（摩洛哥標準）技術及電磁相容標準（與IEC/ETSI/EN協調）、220–240V/50Hz供電及C/E型插頭電氣安全要求、摩洛哥授權進口商義務、法語文件要求、法律05-20下DGSSI網路安全指引，以及5GHz室內頻段限制的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, ANRT homologation, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Moroccan telecommunications law, ANRT homologation procedures, IMANOR NM standards, French-language labelling and documentation obligations, authorized importer registration requirements, cybersecurity requirements under Law 05-20, applicable customs duties, and 5 GHz frequency restrictions with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Morocco.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、ANRT型式核准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于摩洛哥销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行摩洛哥电信法、ANRT型式核准程序、IMANOR NM标准、法语标注及文件义务、授权进口商注册要求、法律05-20下的网络安全要求、适用关税及5GHz频段限制。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、ANRT型式核准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於摩洛哥銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥電信法、ANRT型式核准程序、IMANOR NM標準、法語標注及文件義務、授權進口商註冊要求、法律05-20下的網路安全要求、適用關稅及5GHz頻段限制。

answer_first.en: ANRT mandatory homologation (type approval) under Moroccan Telecom Law 24-96 is the primary gap for any wireless or telecom terminal device exported from China to Morocco. CE mark, CCC, and SRRC approval are not recognised by ANRT; a separate Moroccan homologation process with test reports from ANRT-approved or ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories is required, along with an ANRT homologation certificate and ANRT label displayed on the product. Additional gaps include IMANOR NM-aligned EMC standards (EN/IEC-harmonized), 220–240 V / 50 Hz electrical safety with Type C/E plug, a registered Moroccan authorized importer, French-language product documentation and labelling, DGSSI cybersecurity requirements under Law 05-20, and a 5 GHz indoor-only frequency restriction.
answer_first.zh: 依据摩洛哥电信法24-96，ANRT强制型式核准是中国出口至摩洛哥的任何无线或电信终端设备的首要差距。CE标志、CCC及SRRC批准均不被ANRT承认；须另行完成摩洛哥型式核准程序，提交来自ANRT认可或ILAC/MRA认可实验室的测试报告，并在产品上展示ANRT型式核准证书及ANRT标签。其他差距还包括：IMANOR NM对接的电磁兼容标准（与EN/IEC协调）、220–240V/50Hz电气安全（C/E型插头）、须注册的摩洛哥授权进口商、法语产品文件及标注、法律05-20下DGSSI网络安全要求，以及5GHz仅限室内使用的频率限制。
answer_first.zht: 依據摩洛哥電信法24-96，ANRT強制型式核准是中國出口至摩洛哥的任何無線或電信終端裝置的首要差距。CE標誌、CCC及SRRC批准均不被ANRT承認；須另行完成摩洛哥型式核准程序，提交來自ANRT認可或ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的測試報告，並在產品上展示ANRT型式核准證書及ANRT標籤。其他差距還包括：IMANOR NM對接的電磁相容標準（與EN/IEC協調）、220–240V/50Hz電氣安全（C/E型插頭）、須註冊的摩洛哥授權進口商、法語產品文件及標注、法律05-20下DGSSI網路安全要求，以及5GHz僅限室內使用的頻率限制。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
